summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Planora Phase 3 features: Custom booking duration (15/30/60 min), Google Calendar sync UI, and Meeting Analytics dashboard. All 16 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.

issues: Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after layout settles

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/availability returns slot_duration field
Backend: PUT /api/availability with slot_duration=15 works
Backend: PUT /api/availability with slot_duration=60 works
Backend: PUT /api/availability with slot_duration=30 (default) works
Backend: GET /api/bookings/available/{userId}?date= returns {slots, slot_duration} structure
Backend: Available slots for weekday returns correct slots
Backend: Available slots for weekend returns empty (disabled)
Backend: GET /api/gcal/status returns connection status
Backend: GET /api/gcal/connect returns authorization_url
Backend: POST /api/gcal/disconnect works
Backend: GET /api/analytics returns all required fields (booking_trends, busiest_slots, attendee_responses, etc.)
Backend: Analytics booking_trends structure valid
Backend: Analytics busiest_slots structure valid
Backend: Analytics attendee_responses structure valid
Backend: POST /api/bookings with duration field works
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user info
Frontend: Login flow works correctly
Frontend: Availability page loads with slot duration selector (15/30/60 min buttons)
Frontend: Clicking duration buttons changes selection
Frontend: Save availability button works with toast confirmation
Frontend: Settings page shows Profile section
Frontend: Settings page shows Theme toggles (Light/Dark/System)
Frontend: Settings page shows Google Calendar section with Connect button
Frontend: Settings page shows Booking Link section with copy button
Frontend: Analytics page shows summary cards (Total Events, Bookings, Upcoming, Task Completion)
Frontend: Analytics page shows Booking Trends chart
Frontend: Analytics page shows Attendee Responses pie chart
Frontend: Analytics page shows Busiest Time Slots chart
Frontend: Booking page shows duration badge (30 min meetings)
Frontend: Booking page shows date picker with 7 days
Frontend: Booking page loads time slots correctly (13 slots for tomorrow)
Frontend: Booking form accepts guest name and email
Frontend: Booking confirmation shows success message
seed_data_creation: Seed data already exists for test user with events, tasks, and bookings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 features fully tested and working: 1) Custom booking duration (15/30/60 min) - selector on Availability page, badge on Booking page, API returns slot_duration. 2) Google Calendar sync UI - Settings page has Connect/Sync/Disconnect buttons, API endpoints working. 3) Analytics dashboard - Summary cards and charts (Booking Trends, Attendee Responses, Busiest Slots) all rendering with real data. All APIs are real (no mocks). Email notifications via Resend are configured but not tested for actual delivery.

custom_booking_duration.details: 15/30/60 min selector on Availability page, duration badge on Booking page, API correctly stores and returns slot_duration

google_calendar_sync_ui.details: Settings page shows Google Calendar section with Connect button (not connected state). API endpoints /gcal/status, /gcal/connect, /gcal/disconnect all working

meeting_analytics_dashboard.details: Analytics page shows: Total Events (5), Bookings (1), Upcoming (4), Task Completion (40%). Charts: Booking Trends bar chart, Attendee Responses pie chart (6 accepted, 2 pending, 1 declined), Busiest Time Slots horizontal bar chart

email_notifications.details: Resend API key configured in backend/.env. Email sending code exists in booking creation. Not tested for actual delivery per instructions
